description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, test, and deploy. Use the microsoft/dotnet:latest Docker image for the build and test jobs and node:8.11.4 for the pages job. In the build stage add a build job that runs `dotnet restore` in before_script, then `dotnet build`, and runs only on the master branch. In the test stage add a test job that also runs `dotnet restore` then executes `dotnet test test/FactoryMethodTest/FactoryMethodTest.csproj`, `dotnet test test/AbstractFactoryTest/AbstractFactoryTest.csproj`, `dotnet test test/BuilderTest/BuilderTest.csproj`, and `dotnet test test/PrototypeTest/PrototypeTest.csproj`, only on master. In the deploy stage add a pages job that installs gitbook-cli globally with `npm install gitbook-cli -g`, runs `gitbook install`, caches the `node_modules/` directory, builds the site with `gitbook build . public`, and publishes the `public/` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, also only on master.
